items.title: AI governance / AI Act-oriented architecture review
items.summary: Dry architecture review direction grounded in AGI, L4, evidence, and public source surfaces.

items.title: L4 Witness / evidence-trail / auditability review

items.title: Sovereign / confidential / local-first AI architecture review
